title: IR - Narrow Gauge Novelties
body:
**This pack only works with the Immersive Railroading mod.** Narrow gauge novelties adds a variety of 2ft gauge equipment from the UK to Immersive Railroading. It Includes:

- Hunslet 39HP [FR Harold]
- Kerr, Stuart & Co. 60HP Demonstrator
- 1970's Double Fairlie [FR Earl Of Merioneth II]
- Baldwin 10-12-D
- Baldwin 10-12-1/4D
- Baldwin 50HP [FR Moelwyn]
- Hunslet 0-6-4 [WHR Beddgelert]
- Harbin C2 (2ft Gauge)
- Harbin C2 (2ft6in Gauge)
- Dinorwic Quarry Hunslet, with and without cab
- TGR K Class [WHR K1]
- Kerr Stuart Tattoo
- G. England Fairlie [FR Little Wonder]
- Penrhyn Mainline Hunslet [FR Linda, Blanche]
- Ruston 70HP (Courtesy of Nathan from S&S!)
- OG Small England 0-4-0 [Prince, Princess, Palmerston, Mountaineer]
- Hunslet 2-6-2 [WHR Russel]
- Rebuilt Small England [Prince, Princess, Palmerston]
- Spooner Fairlie [Merddin Emrys, Livingston Thompson, David Lloyd George]
- WHR Single Fairlie [Moel Tryfan, Snowdon Ranger]
- Various Passenger Coaches
- Various Goods Wagons, both generic and real
